name: SAIL Amsterdam 2025
description: The world's largest free nautical event returns to Amsterdam — hundreds of tall ships, naval vessels and historic boats in the IJ harbour. Only happens every 5 years.

name: De Parade Amsterdam
description: Travelling theatre festival in Martin Luther King Park. Small stages, big atmosphere — theatre, cabaret, music and food all in one garden.

name: Amsterdam Light Festival
description: Light art installations along the canals — best experienced by boat or on foot through the city centre. One of Amsterdam's best winter events.

name: Museumplein Ice Rink opens
description: Amsterdam's most atmospheric ice rink opens in front of the Rijksmuseum. Worth going early in the season before it gets crowded.
